findings.title: T021 User Document missing 5 fields promised by task description
findings.source_evidence: Description: 'Includes auto_prompt_enabled, auto_prompt_push_enabled, default_entry_visibility, default_backlog_visibility, keep_backlog_after_log, last_handle_change, created_at, deletion_scheduled_for, session_version, status'
findings.actual: 5 fields absent from User class and test_users_model.py: default_entry_visibility, default_backlog_visibility, keep_backlog_after_log, last_handle_change (code uses handle_changed_at), session_version
findings.cross_check: product-spec/data-model.md:49-51 lists default_entry_visibility / default_backlog_visibility / keep_backlog_after_log as spec-level User fields
findings.proposed_resolution: Add the 5 fields to User OR amend tasks.md T021 to remove them and document deferral in implementation-log.md

findings.title: T024 BacklogItem missing per_item_visibility + note/notes field-name drift
findings.source_evidence: T024 Description: 'BacklogItem with position, per_item_visibility, notes'; plan §3.1 row notes 'Per-album visibility override'
findings.actual: per_item_visibility absent; field is `note` (singular), not `notes`; test_backlog_models.py only exercises `note`
findings.proposed_resolution: Add per_item_visibility: Visibility | None field; reconcile note vs notes naming (cosmetic half)

findings.title: T024 BacklogItem compound index not unique (per status-note claim)
findings.source: .forge-status.yml T024 note: 'BacklogItem with position (compound unique on backlog_id+album_id)'
findings.actual: Indexes (backlog_id, position) + (album_id, backlog_id), both non-unique. No uniqueness anywhere preventing dup album-in-backlog.
findings.proposed_resolution: Add unique=True to (backlog_id, album_id) index OR defer uniqueness to service-layer and amend status note

findings.title: User field-name drift: is_private_profile / last_login_at / last_handle_change vs code names
findings.proposed_resolution: Pick one naming pair and propagate. Recommend aligning spec to code (code names more accurate).

findings.title: T027 CriticSeed field + index drift
findings.source_evidence: T027 note: 'CriticSeed (unique on user_id partial active=True; priority/category/description)'; data-model.md sketch shows category enum + description field
findings.actual: Fields genre_signature, public_bio, notes (no category, no description); user_id has plain unique=True with separate active partial index (not merged into a unique-partial)
findings.proposed_resolution: Either rename fields to category/description OR update data-model.md to track richer code shape; merge user_id indexes into one unique-partial if intent is 'one active critic-seed per user'

findings.title: Duplicate ## Session 3 header in implementation-log.md
findings.actual: Both lines use '## Session 3' (first is Infra-decision swaps; second is §0 closeout + backend data layer — should be Session 4)
findings.proposed_resolution: Renumber line 155 to '## Session 4 …' and bump .forge-status.yml session_count from 3 to 4
